rationale: _fragments_dir() is the single source of truth used by all 5 call sites; no use case for the fragment dir to diverge from log_path. Option B would add a competing source of truth and a new schema surface with no driving requirement.
rule: Keep .ll/decisions.d/ fragment dir derived from decisions.log_path via _fragments_dir(); no independent config key
alternatives_rejected: Option B: add a fragment_dir property to the decisions schema block + DecisionsConfig and thread it through _fragments_dir()
